## Tujuan

Jelaskan perubahan.

## Business Rule

Jelaskan aturan bisnis yang ditambah atau diubah.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Docker
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Security and Tenancy

- [ ] Tenant scope diperiksa
- [ ] Permission diperiksa
- [ ] Audit ditambahkan
- [ ] Secret tidak di-commit

## Data and Migration

- [ ] Migration tersedia
- [ ] Constraint/index diperiksa
- [ ] Downgrade/recovery dipertimbangkan

## Test

- [ ] Unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] Cross-tenant
- [ ] Invalid state
- [ ] Duplicate/idempotency
- [ ] Frontend build

## Accounting / Tax Impact

Jelaskan jurnal dan tax impact.

## Rollback

Jelaskan cara rollback.
